commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `channels/imessage` WARN before the private API bridge-unavailable throw, adds focused iMessage action coverage, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current `main` reaches the private API bridge-unavailable throw in `extensions/imessage/src/actions.ts` without a logger call, and the docs describe this stale bridge dispatch-time failure mode. I did not live-run a macOS iMessage bridge in this read-only review.
